---
title: "Alethea Henrietta Yonge"
---

## Alethea Henrietta Yonge

**Dates:** (7 June 1789-28 Oct 1844)

**Maiden name:** (Bargus)

### Description

aunt of CMY, half-sister of FMY

### Biography

Known as ‘Aunt Yonge’, she married (25 March 1813) the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 12th 1885 
- Letter from October 8, 1868
- Letter from July 13th [31 July 1863][[footnote:2]]
- Letter from Friday [3 March 1854]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1844]
- Letter from Novr 19th [1844]
- Letter from Novr 6th 1844
- Letter from All Saints [1 November 1844[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
